topic: Energy is not only about stimulation
continuity_tokens: same Japanese professional in early 30s across shots 01 to 03
pale oak surfaces, cloud white, mist blue, soft daylight
oatmeal knit or pale blue home-work styling
no coffee hero prop and no baked-in text
visual_intent: calm self-check before the day accelerates
brand_guardrails: avoid repeating the March 25 seated desk composition
keep the scene calm, premium, and believable
the scene must fill the entire 4:5 canvas with no white bands, blank bars, inset-card framing, or smaller image area inside the frame
composition: subject standing or lightly leaning near a window or kitchen counter
generous left-side breathing room inside the scene itself
extend the environment naturally to all canvas edges
reference_strategy: Use the approved Set 4 lifestyle working example for routine realism, then let the whitespace and cool-palette anchors hold premium restraint and a calm morning atmosphere.
variation_guardrails: do not reuse the seated laptop-desk setup from March 25
switch to a home-morning foundation scene instead of visible work strain
keep the subject composed rather than obviously exhausted
reject and regenerate if coffee, laptop focus, or office-desk coding dominates the frame
reject and regenerate if the image is not true full-bleed 4:5
notes: April 1 reel shot 01. Opening hook should feel like a soft morning self-check before momentum takes over. Full-bleed 4:5 only, with real in-scene negative space.
